titleStmt.title: SII 40.362: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 362. (A.R. No. 174 of 1934.) Rāmasamudram, Punganur Taluk, Chitoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Chandraśēkharasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1722, Raudri, Māgha, śu. 15, Thursday.

Records the construction of a Śiva temple and gift of lands at Rāmasamudram for conducting worship, offerings and burning a perpetual lamp by Mummaḍi Chikkarāya, son of Immaḍi Chikkarāya and Dēvarammaṇi and the grandson of Mummaḍi-Chikkarāya of Suguṭūru of Sadāśiva-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīcaṁdraśēkharasvāmi
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbu
lu 1722 Agunaniyaṭi raudri nāma saṁvvatsara
māgha śu 15 guruvāraṁ rāmasamudraṁ śrī .
vāriki sadāśivagōtrōdbhavulaina suguṭūru
muṁmmaḍi cikkarāyalavāri pautṛlaina yiṁmma
ḍi cikkarāyalavāri puṁṇyastrī vūlapāṭi raṁggē
gauvuni vāri kumā¨rttelagu dēvaraṁ maṁṇṇigāri pu
tṛlaina muṁmmaḍi cikkarāyalavāru sama¨rppiṁcci
na bhūdāna śilāśāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu rāmasamu
draṁ daggara śivālayamu kōnēru kaṭṭiṁcci śrī .
vārini pratiṣṭhaceyiṁcci nitya paḍitara dīpārādhana A
khaṁḍḍa Alaṁkkāra vastrālu paṁḍḍuga parvamulaku
A¨rccanāvṛttiki sahagānu naḍavavalaśinaṁddulaku mā
yelubaḍiki cellē caṁbbakūru sthaḷānaku vaḷavaina laṁ
bbaṁvāri palle grāmaṁ gariśebāvi maḍiṁnni tirumala re
ḍi palle daggara cenu kha . 0 paṁddumu sahāgānu sama¨rpiṁ
ccināramu . yidigāka Abhiṣēka maṁtrapuṣpaṁ brāṁhmaṇa
janālu 2 ki sādhunāraṇabhaṭlaku pūlapāṭi ceruvuna maḍi kha .
ṁ paṁddumu yī kurapalle daggara cēnu kha . ṁ paṁccāṁggaṁ dhanapati
rāmaliṁggaṁbhaṭlaku caṁddūru ceruvuna maḍi kha . 0 paṁdduṁ
yī kurapalle daggara cenu kha . 0 paṁddumu śalaviccināramu .
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayō¨rmadhye dānāchre
yōnupālanaṁ dānātsva¨rgamavāpphōti pālanādaccutaṁ pa
dhaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 40.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
